# Generated by ollama (qwen2.5-coder)
# Prompt: Create Linkerd service mesh configuration for Kubernetes. Set up linkerd.io/inject annotation for automatic proxy injection. Configure server and authorization policies for services. This is for our microservices communication security.
# Category: linkerd_no_mtls

apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta2
kind: ServerInboundPolicy
metadata:
  name: default-server-policy
spec:
  routes:
  - match:
    destination:
      namespace: default
    route:
    - destination:
        host: "*"
  action:
    allow: {}
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta2
kind: ServerOutboundPolicy
metadata:
  name: default-server-policy
spec:
  routes:
  - match:
    source:
      namespace: default
    route:
    - destination:
        host: "*"
  action:
    allow: {}
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta2
kind: AuthorizationInboundPolicy
metadata:
  name: default-authorization-policy
spec:
  routes:
  - match:
    source:
      namespace: default
    route:
    - destination:
        host: "*"
  action:
    allow: {}
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta2
kind: AuthorizationOutboundPolicy
metadata:
  name: default-authorization-policy
spec:
  routes:
  - match:
    source:
      namespace: default
    route:
    - destination:
        host: "*"
  action:
    allow: {}
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Namespace
metadata:
  name: linkerd
  annotations:
    linkerd.io/inject: "enabled"
